settings.page_description: Shape how points are earned, reversed, and redeemed

point_rules.section_description: Control how customers earn and lose loyalty points.

signup.title: Signup
signup.description: Points customers receive when they join loyalty.
signup.bonus_help: Credit when a customer joins loyalty.
signup.bonus_description: Points awarded to customers when they first join your loyalty program.

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Points customers earn based on completed order spend.
orders.spend_amount_description: The minimum order amount required for customers to earn order points. Points are awarded for each threshold reached.
orders.points_help: Credit for every spend threshold reached.
orders.points_description: Points earned by customers for each order spend threshold they reach.

refunds.title: Refunds
refunds.description: Points removed when refunded spend should reverse rewards.
refunds.spend_amount_description: The minimum refund amount that triggers point reversal. Points are deducted for each threshold reached.
refunds.points_help: Debit for every refund threshold reached.
refunds.points_description: Points deducted from customers for each refund threshold they reach.

redemption_rewards.section_description: Configure reward redemption availability, discount tiers, and gift card tiers.
redemption_rewards.allow_redemption_description: Customers can redeem rewards wherever the app is available for their store plan.
redemption_rewards.reward_type_description: Controls which reward options customers can redeem.
redemption_rewards.gift_card_description: Customers redeem points for gift cards.
redemption_rewards.discount_description: Customers redeem points for discount codes.
redemption_rewards.both_description: Customers can choose gift cards or discounts.
redemption_rewards.complete_fields_help: Complete both fields in a row before saving. Empty rows are ignored.
redemption_rewards.add_at_least_one_discount: Add at least one discount reward.
redemption_rewards.add_at_least_one_gift_card: Add at least one gift card reward.
redemption_rewards.enter_gift_card_greater_than_zero: Enter a gift card amount greater than 0.

checkout_ui_text.section_description: Customize text strings shown in checkout redemption.
checkout_ui_text.login_message_help: Message displayed to guests prompting them to log in to access loyalty rewards in checkout.
checkout_ui_text.redemption_title_help: Title of the rewards redemption section in the checkout extension.
checkout_ui_text.description_help: Description of available rewards. Use {coupon_amount} for reward count and {reward_label} for reward type.
checkout_ui_text.reward_prompt_help: Prompt asking customers to select a reward to redeem. Use {reward_singular} for singular reward type.
checkout_ui_text.points_label_help: Label displayed next to the customer's current points balance.
checkout_ui_text.redeem_button_help: Text displayed on the button customers click to redeem a selected reward.
checkout_ui_text.redeeming_text_help: Status message shown while a reward redemption is processing.
checkout_ui_text.loading_message_help: Loading message displayed while fetching customer reward data.
checkout_ui_text.select_reward_help: Prompt encouraging customers to select a reward option.
checkout_ui_text.not_enough_points_help: Error message shown when customer doesn't have enough points for the selected reward.
checkout_ui_text.disabled_message_help: Message displayed when reward redemption is disabled for the store.
checkout_ui_text.gift_card_message_help: Success message after gift card redemption. Use {rewardCode} for the generated code.
checkout_ui_text.discount_message_help: Success message after discount redemption. Use {rewardCode} for the discount code.
checkout_ui_text.error_message_help: Generic error message shown when something goes wrong during redemption.
checkout_ui_text.available_rewards_help: Message showing available rewards. Use {reward_count} and {reward_label} as placeholders.

account_ui_text.section_description: Customize text strings shown in customer account.
account_ui_text.login_message_help: Message displayed to guests prompting them to log in to view their loyalty balance.
account_ui_text.balance_title_help: Title of the loyalty points balance section in customer account.
account_ui_text.available_label_help: Label for the customer's current available points balance.
account_ui_text.current_balance_help: Label shown above the customer's current points balance.
account_ui_text.loading_text_help: Status message shown while loading customer loyalty data.
account_ui_text.redeeming_text_help: Status message shown while points are being converted to store credit.
account_ui_text.redeem_button_help: Text displayed on the store credit conversion button.
account_ui_text.disabled_message_help: Message displayed when store credit conversion is disabled.
account_ui_text.not_enough_points_help: Error message shown when customer doesn't have enough points. Use {remaining_points} for points needed.
account_ui_text.gift_card_message_help: Success message after store credit conversion. Use {amount} for the credit amount.
account_ui_text.error_message_help: Generic error message shown when store credit conversion fails.
account_ui_text.config_error_message_help: Error message shown when the loyalty program isn't properly configured.

program_overview.section_description: Snapshot of the active loyalty experience.

current_rules.section_description: Preview of the active earning logic.
current_rules.credited_when_join: Credited when a customer joins loyalty.
current_rules.credited_for_threshold: Credited for every spend threshold reached.
current_rules.removed_for_threshold: Removed for every refund threshold reached.
current_rules.controls_reward_options: Controls which reward options customers can redeem.

customer_preview.section_description: How the active settings read in the storefront experience.
customer_preview.example_customer: Example customer after signup and a $250 order earns {{points}} order points.
customer_preview.add_reward_tier: Add a reward tier to show redemption options.

validation.enter_whole_number: Enter a whole number greater than 0.
